title: Safe Minimum Internal Temperatures
summary: Poultry must reach 165°F (74°C) to ensure safety. Ground meats should reach 160°F.

title: Cross-Contamination Prevention
summary: Always use separate cutting boards for raw meat and produce. Wash hands for 20 seconds.

title: Refrigerator Storage Guidelines
summary: Maintain fridge temp below 40°F. Store raw meat on the bottom shelf to prevent drips.
